_comment_1: ADK reads this file at deploy time and merges its fields into the Vertex AI agent_engines.create() call. The `service_account` field tells Vertex AI to run the deployed Reasoning Engine as this specific service account, instead of the Forum project's default compute SA. That gives each agent its own runtime identity, so Google Doc / Sheet / Drive / Workspace API calls authenticate as the per-agent SA — sharing a doc with the per-agent SA email actually grants access to this agent and no others.
_comment_2: get_started_linux.sh substitutes the {{BOT_ACCOUNT_ID}} and {{AGENT_PROJECT_ID}} placeholders below with the values you provide during bootstrap. The cross-project IAM binding that lets the Forum project run a Reasoning Engine as this SA is provisioned by terraform (see google_service_account_iam_member.engine_token_creator in main.tf).
_comment_3: Do not edit this file by hand after bootstrap — re-run get_started_linux.sh if you need to change the SA. If you really know what you are doing, the field name and shape come from the Vertex AI agent_engines API: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/generative-ai/docs/agent-engine.
